mapper.sql: id, vault_id, type, title, original_path, original_hash, extracted_text_path, source_url, status, error_message, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO source_document (vault_id, type, title, original_path, original_hash, extracted_text_path, source_url, status, error_message, deleted) VALUES (#{vaultId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{originalPath}, #{originalHash}, #{extractedTextPath}, #{sourceUrl}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM source_document WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM source_document WHERE vault_id = #{vaultId} AND original_path = #{originalPath} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE source_document SET vault_id = #{vaultId}, type = #{type}, title = #{title}, original_path = #{originalPath}, original_hash = #{originalHash}, extracted_text_path = #{extractedTextPath}, source_url = #{sourceUrl}, status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM source_document WHERE vault_id = #{vaultId} AND deleted = 0
